about.title: About
about.intro: Senior Fullstack Developer with 7+ years delivering web products end-to-end. High AI fluency — agentic workflows, Claude Code and Cursor are part of how I work, not a shortcut.
about.bio0: I build full-stack web products from database schema to UI interaction — React, TypeScript and Next.js on the frontend, Node.js and PostgreSQL on the backend. I have high AI fluency: I use Claude Code, Cursor and agentic workflows daily as a core part of how I ship, not as a crutch. This means faster iteration, fewer context switches, and better output.
about.bio1: My background spans product setup from scratch, architecture decisions, auth flows, admin panels, payment integrations, e-commerce, mobile apps with React Native, and close collaboration with QA, design, BAs and product stakeholders.
about.bio2: I work best where I can own problems end-to-end. I move fast without breaking things — because I know when to reach for AI and when to think it through myself.
about.techStackSub: What I reach for most. Frontend to backend.
about.bioHeading: Senior Fullstack Developer, based in Kyrgyzstan.
